title: Ashen + EMI Compatibility
description: Ashen Resourcepack addon — adds compatibility with the EMI mod and some of EMI addons.
body:
This addon provides modified slot, inventory, creative tab, and other textures to ensure compatibility with the EMI mod while preserving the Ashen resourcepack style.

It offers compatibility with the following mods:
- EMI
- EMI Enchants
- EMI Effects
- EMI Loot

Other EMI addons should also use textures from this pack to maintain a consistent look.

---

If you encounter any issues, please contact me (**sof_izh**) on the [Ashen Discord server](https://discord.gg/k5pDjKbhdh). Do **not** report these issues to **Aim_Boot**, as this is just a fan-made addon and is not officially affiliated with the main Ashen resourcepack.

---

Credits:
- Aim_Boot – [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) resourcepack
- Emi – [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) mod
